texto: Don't let them see how fast you really are; don't let them see the control you have, the ability you have to read them and the situation. Let them think you're out of control. Let them think you are going to be easy. Because they will be anything but, and you need to be ready for the fight of your life.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Shannon Mayer sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “Don't let them see how fast you really are; don't let them see the control you have, the ability …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, fight, control, útil em momentos de reflexao.
